author: Dean Wheatley
summary: Line-Level Collision Detection: the collision evaluator now distinguishes between "same file, different sections" (Proximity) and "same file, same lines" (Collision Course) when line range data is available; New `Proximity` collision state (severity 2.5): same file as another user but non-overlapping line ranges — does not pause the agent, does not trigger Slack at default verbosity; File watcher reports modified line ranges via `git diff --unified=0` hunk headers alongside file paths
